description_long: This is a sleek, blue and gold military jet aircraft with 'US NAVY' markings prominently displayed on its wings and fuselage. The airplane features a streamlined fuselage, swept-back mid-mounted wings with gold-tipped edges, and a pointed nose cone. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy and positioned at the front of the fuselage, likely accommodating a single pilot. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all accented with gold tips. The landing gear is deployed, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel beneath the cockpit. The overall design and livery suggest it is modeled after a classic US Navy demonstration or fighter jet, such as those used by the Blue Angels.
description: A blue and gold US Navy jet with swept mid-mounted wings, a pointed nose, and an enclosed forward cockpit. The aircraft features prominent military markings and a streamlined, high-performance design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the jet, US NAVY markings, cockpit canopy, and deployed landing gear.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the jet exhaust, swept wings, and tail section with gold-tipped stabilizers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other side of the fuselage, wing markings, and landing gear.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the wing shape, gold tips, and overall planform of the aircraft.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept-back wings with moderate dihedral and gold-tipped edges; no winglets visible.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, all with gold tips.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, all deployed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy integrated into the fuselage.
